creator: frank@dynamical-systems.org
text:
Hi Gabor,

All right, I'm going to prepare the stuff. I'd also like to take the 
opportunity to retry once more with Slackware 11.0 as there might have 
been some recent progress. Anyway, all this will take me a couple of days
and you'll be notified when I'm done.

Thanks for your support,
Frank
